creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
JVim 3.0 is a text editor that is upwards compatible to vi. It can be
used to edit any ASCII and Japanese(JIS/JIS/EUC/Unicod) text.  It is
especially useful for editing programs.

How-To-Repeat: begin 644 jvim3-981001.tar.gz
